premise: A salvage crew operating in the debris field of a destroyed space station finds an intact cryo-pod with a living occupant. The station was destroyed in a classified military action twenty years ago, and every record says there were no survivors. The occupant remembers why the station was really destroyed.

characters.name: Kess Adeyemi
characters.description: Salvage captain, mid-30s. Runs a three-person crew on tight margins. Nigerian-British. Sharp negotiator, fair divider of shares, terrible at saying no to risky jobs. Lost her previous ship to a debris strike and is still paying it off.

characters.name: Lior
characters.description: The cryo-pod occupant. Former station researcher, physically mid-20s but chronologically mid-40s. Disoriented, frightened, and carrying classified knowledge they didn't ask for. Speaks in the clipped, formal syntax of someone who hasn't had a casual conversation in twenty years.

characters.name: Commander Vasik
characters.description: Military intelligence officer dispatched when the cryo-pod's beacon activated. Professional, restrained, authorized to offer the crew enough money to retire — or to classify them as material witnesses, which means they never leave military custody.
